patch.value: Publish pm-github starter package as a community reference (credential-requiring pattern)
docs/EXTENSIONS.md cites 'pm install npm:pm-github' but the package does not exist; it would validate the npm-install path end-to-end and model service-credential packages (GitHub/Jira/Linear/Slack).

Minimal published @unbrained/pm-github registers a command that errors with clear credential-setup guidance when unconfigured; manifest has pm_min_version+catalog+commands; install+doctor work; docs reference published version.
docs/EXTENSIONS.md cites 'pm install npm:pm-github' but the package does not exist; it would validate the npm-install path end-to-end and model service-credential packages (GitHub/Jira/Linear/Slack).
